debug_info.goal:
U : Type
⊢ ctble U ↔ ∃ f, one_to_one f

failed_attempts:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · rintro ⟨A, f, hf⟩
    exists λ x => (f x).val
    intros x1 x2 h
    exact hf.left (Subtype.ext h)
  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩
    exists range f
    exists λ x => ⟨f x, x, rfl⟩
    apply bijective_intro
    · intros x1 x2 h
      injection h with h'
      exact hf h'
    · rintro ⟨n, x, hx⟩
      exists x
      exact Subtype.ext hx

  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨A, hA⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨f, g, -, hgf⟩ := (equinum_iff_inverse_pair U A).mp hA
    exists (λ u => (f u).val)
    intro u1 u2 hu
    have hf : f u1 = f u2 := Subtype.ext hu
    rw [← congr_fun hgf u1, ← congr_fun hgf u2, hf]

    exists range f
    rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
    refine ⟨λ u => ⟨f u, ⟨u, rfl⟩⟩, λ a => Classical.choose a.property, ?_⟩
    constructor
    · funext a; exact Subtype.ext (Classical.choose_spec a.property)
    · funext u; exact hf (Classical.choose_spec ⟨u, rfl⟩)
dominant_iff_equinum_Set.symm

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨A, hA⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := equinum_symm hA
    use fun u => (g u).val
    intro u1 u2 hf
    exact hg.1 (Subtype.ext hf)
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    let A := range f
    use A
    let g : U → Subtype A := fun u => ⟨f u, ⟨u, rfl⟩⟩
    have hg : biject g := ⟨fun u1 u2 h => hf (congrArg Subtype.val h),
      fun ⟨n, hn⟩ => let ⟨u, hu⟩ := hn; ⟨u, Subtype.ext hu⟩⟩
    exact equinum_symm ⟨g, hg⟩
